metadata.purpose: Core business metrics definitions and calculation methods for Denver Satellite (889)

ab_ratio.name: A/B Ratio
ab_ratio.definition: Billable hours sold divided by paid hours worked
ab_ratio.formula: Time Sold (A Hours) / Paid Hours (B Hours) × 100
ab_ratio.importance: Primary efficiency metric - measures shop productivity
ab_ratio.context: Higher is better. Shows how efficiently paid labor converts to billable work.

revenue.name: Daily/Monthly Revenue
revenue.definition: Total billed revenue from closed work orders

time_sold.name: Time Sold (A Hours)
time_sold.definition: Billable hours charged to customer work orders

paid_hours.name: Paid Hours (B Hours)
paid_hours.definition: Total hours employees are paid for (including non-billable)

nps.name: Net Promoter Score
nps.definition: Customer satisfaction metric from post-service surveys
nps.target_2026: Maintain high scores, track survey completion
nps.goal: Send NPS survey to every customer on billed WOs

wip_account.name: Work In Progress Account
wip_account.definition: Unbilled labor value on open work orders

interpretation.positive: Good - represents unbilled work that will convert to revenue
interpretation.negative: Bad - overdrawn, labor costs exceed what can be billed

days_to_bill.name: Days to Bill
days_to_bill.definition: Average days from WO completion to customer billing
days_to_bill.target: Minimize - faster billing improves cash flow

over_30.name: Over 30 Days Report
over_30.definition: Work orders open longer than 30 days
over_30.action: Review and resolve or communicate delays

SDV.name: SDV Install Shop
SDV.billing_model: Time & Materials with expected hour targets

calculation_notes.employee_loans: WOs from other shops (e.g., DB1UA from NJ) appear in Denver when techs are loaned out. Hours count toward Denver financials but billing controlled by originating shop.
calculation_notes.sdv_wip_calculation: SDV Special WIP for Matt: Filter Time Sold (SDV) → Cross-ref Anchor (OPEN WOs only) → Exclude billed → Filter >10hrs → Calculate @ $70/hr. MUST verify WO is open before including.
